title: nie-bot: notification dispatcher (relay notification → BotEvent)
description:
What: Convert incoming JsonRpcNotification from relay into BotEvent values.

Algorithm:
1. Create bot/src/dispatcher.rs with pub async fn dispatch(notif: JsonRpcNotification, config: &ResolvedBotConfig) -> Result<Option<BotEvent>>:
   - match notif.method.as_str() against rpc_methods::* constants from nie_core::protocol::rpc_methods
   - DELIVER: parse DeliverParams from notif.params; deserialize payload as ClearMessage; Chat → MessageReceived; Payment with PaymentAction::Request → PaymentRequest; other variants → None
   - WHISPER_DELIVER: same as DELIVER
   - DIRECTORY_LIST: parse DirectoryListParams; emit Nothing here (caller handles separately)
   - USER_JOINED: parse UserJoinedParams → BotEvent::UserJoined
   - USER_LEFT: parse UserLeftParams → BotEvent::UserLeft
   - unknown method: return Ok(None) — never Err for unknown methods
2. Payload deserialization failures: log at debug level, return Ok(None) — relay is untrusted; malformed payload must not crash bot

Defensive:
- notif.params missing → Ok(None), not panic
- ClearMessage deserialization failure → debug log + Ok(None), never propagate
- NEVER inspect payload as utf-8 string; always serde_json::from_slice on raw bytes

Agent team: R (researcher: read core/src/protocol.rs, messages.rs), I (implementer), V (validator).
Tests: see Wave 4 dispatcher tests
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-bot clean; dispatches DELIVER correctly; unknown methods return None; clippy clean
